blended.narrative: Nub's Nob is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
